heading: Real-Time Performance Panel (RTPP)
body:
The [Real-Time Performance Panel](real-time-metrics-status-tab)
identifies relevant database operations, evaluates query execution
times, and shows the ratio of documents scanned to documents returned
during query execution. RTPP (Real-Time Performance Panel) is enabled by default.

> **Important:** 
>
> Required Privileges
>
> To enable or disable Real-Time Performance Panel for a
> project, you must have the [Project Owner](<Project Owner>) role for the
> project.
